items.title_en: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 20%
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌20%
items.desc_en: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Whirlpool, Shake Shack, McDonald's, Arm Holdings & more
items.title_zh: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：惠而浦 (Whirlpool)、Shake Shack、麦当劳、Arm Holdings 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Family office deal-making rebounds in April with healthcare bets
items.title_zh: 家族办公室交易在四月份因医疗保健押注而反弹
items.desc_en: Healthcare startups made up nearly a third of April's investments by family offices.
items.desc_zh: 医疗保健初创公司占家族办公室 4 月份投资的近三分之一。

items.title_en: Families still see college as a good investment — figuring out how to pay for it is the challenge
items.title_zh: 家庭仍然认为大学是一项不错的投资——弄清楚如何支付学费是一个挑战
items.desc_en: Roughly 82% of families with high school students considering college say they believe it will be worth the high cost, according to a new report by Sallie.
items.desc_zh: Sallie 的一份新报告显示，大约 82% 的有高中生考虑上大学的家庭表示，他们相信付出高昂的代价是值得的。

items.title_en: Amazon to carry Ozempic pill at U.S. kiosks, offer same-day delivery
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将在美国售货亭出售 Ozempic 药丸并提供当日送达服务
items.desc_en: Amazon said on Thursday its pharmacy will stock Novo Nordisk's Ozempic pill to treat type 2 diabetes at its kiosks and ⁠offer same-day delivery of the drug.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊周四表示，其药房将在其售货亭备有诺和诺德 (Novo Nordisk) 治疗 2 型糖尿病的 Ozempic 药丸，并提供当日送达服务。

items.title_en: Gold and silver's historic rally could resume 'as fog of war lifts', market watchers say
items.title_zh: 市场观察人士称，随着战争迷雾消散，黄金和白银的历史性涨势可能会恢复
items.desc_en: On Thursday, spot gold jumped 1.2% to $4,750 per ounce amid hopes that the U.S. and Iran could be nearing a deal to bring the 69-day war to an end.
items.desc_zh: 周四，现货黄金上涨 1.2%，至每盎司 4,750 美元，市场寄希望于美国和伊朗可能接近达成协议，结束 69 天的战争。

items.title_en: US judge releases Jeffrey Epstein's purported suicide note
items.title_zh: 美国法官公布了杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的遗书
items.desc_en: Epstein's former cellmate claims he found the note, which has not been verified by the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 爱泼斯坦的前狱友声称他发现了这张纸条，但这一消息尚未得到英国广播公司 (BBC) 的证实。

items.title_en: China announces suspended death sentences for former defence ministers

items.desc_zh: 此前，中国军方几名高级官员最近被罢黜。

items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候

items.desc_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。
